title: pleopeltis neglecta
intro: Pleopeltis neglecta, also known as the resurrection fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pleopeltis neglecta include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas or infusions, although more research is needed to fully explore its medicinal applications.
